memory.recent_lessons_md:
### 2026-05-18 — Strategy switch Day 1 failure

- API STILL BLOCKED (HTTP 403). ALL 5 predecessor routines silently failed. All 5 MOC orders blocked.
- Strategy switch MOO sells (TSM/NVDA/JPM/AVGO) UNCONFIRMED — operator may or may not have executed manually.
- AMD: 5th consecutive entry attempt blocked. Deployment Bias violation count now 5.
- NVDA earnings 3 days away. Exit urgency is maximum. Last clean exit is May 19 open.
- Benchmark gap: -4.15pp. Entire gap attributable to API blockage.

### 2026-05-17 — Strategy switch (operator directive)

- Allocation changed to 85% active + 10% crypto + 5% cash floor.
- LT bucket retired. MOO sells queued. GLD only carryover.
- Verified actual Alpaca positions via /v2/positions: TSM 7sh, GLD 7sh, NVDA 15sh, JPM 9sh, AVGO 7sh (actual fill 7sh not 11sh). XLE=0.

### 2026-05-13-14 — PPI shock + Trump-Xi Summit

- PPI +1.4% vs +0.5% expected. S&P rose anyway — AI/tech narrative dominant.
- NVDA +4.54% on Jensen Huang summit attendance. Markets at all-time records.
- PLTR below $134 support zone — skip until reclaim.
